### What
One sentence summary.

### Why
What problem does this solve?

### How
Approach in 2-4 bullets.

### Validation
- [ ] Stage 0 equivalence test still passes (`pytest tests/equivalence_test.py`)
- [ ] Backtest deltas measured (Sharpe / Return / Max DD / trade count)
- [ ] No leak of strategy parameters into committed code
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`

### Screenshots / charts
If the change affects PnL or risk, attach the before/after equity curve.
